prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical mirror selfie shot on a white iPhone 16, featuring Neha, a stylish young Pakistani woman standing centered in front of a large rounded-arch wall mirror with a warm yellow backlit glow. She has messy voluminous long wavy dark hair and a cute confident pose, holding the phone in her right hand so it partly covers her face, while her left hand gives a thumbs-up. She is wearing a traditional white embroidered shalwar kameez with delicate lace cuffs and scattered pink floral embroidery, plus a soft pale pink dupatta covered in small pink flower prints draped over both shoulders and across the chest. Add modern gold-rimmed sunglasses hanging from her phone hand, and a black smartwatch on her left wrist. The setting is a clean modern dressing room or boutique lounge with cream walls, two beige upholstered chairs visible at the left and right edges, a slim white console table behind her, and soft warm ambient lighting. Make the image photorealistic, high-resolution, natural smartphone perspective, slight indoor mirror reflections, realistic fabric texture, flattering warm tones, and no text or watermark.
